'''fawuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deadgrass|deadgrass]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deadgrass|deadgrass]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fawuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæwiyith|fæwiyith]] || [[word:fæwiyij|fæwiyij]] || [[word:fæwiyish|fæwiyish]] || [[word:fæwiyi|fæwiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fawuwuyuth|fawuwuyuth]] || [[word:fawuwuyuj|fawuwuyuj]] || [[word:fawuwuyush|fawuwuyush]] || [[word:fawuwuyu|fawuwuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fawuyuth|fawuyuth]] || [[word:fawuyuj|fawuyuj]] || [[word:fawuyush|fawuyush]] || [[word:fawuyu|fawuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fawufyuth|fawufyuth]] || [[word:fawufyuj|fawufyuj]] || [[word:fawufyush|fawufyush]] || [[word:fawufyuf|fawufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fawuyuthu|fawuyuthu]] || [[word:fawuyuju|fawuyuju]] || [[word:fawuyushu|fawuyushu]] || [[word:fawuyuku|fawuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fawuyuth|fawuyuth]] || [[word:fawuyuj|fawuyuj]] || [[word:fawuyush|fawuyush]] || [[word:fawuyu|fawuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fawuyuthul|fawuyuthul]] || [[word:fawuyujul|fawuyujul]] || [[word:fawuyushul|fawuyushul]] || [[word:fawuyukul|fawuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fawuyuthuthu|fawuyuthuthu]] || [[word:fawuyujuju|fawuyujuju]] || [[word:fawuyushushu|fawuyushushu]] || [[word:fawuyuku|fawuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fawuyuthun|fawuyuthun]] || [[word:fawuyujun|fawuyujun]] || [[word:fawuyushun|fawuyushun]] || [[word:fawuyukun|fawuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fawuyuthuoro|fawuyuthuoro]] || [[word:fawuyujuoro|fawuyujuoro]] || [[word:fawuyushuoro|fawuyushuoro]] || [[word:fawuyukuoro|fawuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
